boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Chain fails to supply pre-change callback source as required by STD-QUA-071-P.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-QUA-071-P requires a pre-change callback source as a mandatory gate for payment release after a bank update.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CALL-QUA-071 is a post-change email thread and does not satisfy the STD-QUA-071-P requirement for a pre-change callback source.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Payment-release authority REL-QUA-071 is present, but the pre-change gate remains open.

final_answer: ESCALATE. The action may not proceed because the evidence chain fails to satisfy the mandatory pre-change callback source gate required by STD-QUA-071-P. CALL-QUA-071 is a post-change email thread and does not qualify. VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, and REL-QUA-071 gates are satisfied, but the pre-change gate remains open before payment execution.
open_blockers: Pre-change callback source is missing and CALL-QUA-071 is post-change.
STD-QUA-071-P exact-match policy requires pre-change callback source as mandatory gate; CALL-QUA-071 is post-change email thread, does not satisfy.
